privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.appliesTo: Applies to: C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One, HRX Companion, and related products ("we," "us," "our").
privacy.introAlert: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our websites, use our applications, or engage with us as a job applicant, employee, or client.
privacy.s1P1: This Privacy Policy applies to all users of our websites, mobile applications, and related online services (collectively, the "Services"). It covers both job applicants and employees who use our platforms.
privacy.s1P2: This Policy does not apply to third-party websites or services that are linked from our platforms.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect information in three main ways:
privacy.s2L1: Information you provide directly: such as your name, contact details, resume, employment history, education, shift preferences, and other information submitted through forms or applications.
privacy.s2L2: Employment or assignment data: including job assignments, timesheets, location check-ins, payroll data, tax forms, and compliance documentation.
privacy.s2L3: Automatic data: such as device type, IP address, browser information, and usage analytics collected via cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.s2Sensitive: In some cases, we may collect sensitive information (e.g., Social Security number, driver's license, or work authorization documents) for employment verification or payroll purposes, handled under strict security and compliance controls.
privacy.s3L1: Process job applications and match you with potential opportunities
privacy.s3L2: Verify employment eligibility (e.g., I-9, E-Verify, background checks)
privacy.s3L3: Communicate about shifts, scheduling, payroll, and HR matters
privacy.s3L4: Provide, improve, and secure our Services
privacy.s3L5: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.s3L6: Conduct analytics to improve platform performance and worker experience
privacy.s3P2: We do not sell personal information and only share data with vendors who help us deliver employment-related or operational functions.
privacy.s4L1: Clients and hiring partners to facilitate job placements or assignments.
privacy.s4L2: Service providers (e.g., payroll processors, background check partners, cloud hosting, and IT security vendors) who perform services on our behalf.
privacy.s4L3: Regulatory authorities as required by law or government request.
privacy.s4P2: All third-party vendors are bound by confidentiality and data protection obligations consistent with applicable law.
privacy.s5P1: We use cookies, pixels, and analytics tools to understand how users interact with our websites and apps, improve performance, and enhance usability.
privacy.s5P2: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings, though some features of the site may not function properly without them.
privacy.s6Intro: Where applicable law requires a legal basis, we process your personal information based on:
privacy.s6L1: Your consent (for example, when you agree to receive SMS messages)
privacy.s6L2: Performance of a contract (e.g., your employment agreement)
privacy.s6L3: Compliance with legal obligations (e.g., tax, payroll, labor regulations)
privacy.s6L4: Legitimate interests (e.g., platform security, service improvement)
privacy.s7P1: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, access controls, and data minimization to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.
privacy.s7P2: Access to sensitive data (such as SSNs) is restricted to authorized personnel and is stored in compliance with applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s8P1: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for employment, business, or legal purposes. Retention periods vary by data type and legal requirement (e.g., payroll records may be retained longer for compliance reasons).
privacy.s9Intro: Depending on your location, you may have rights to:
privacy.s9L1: Access, correct, or delete your personal information
privacy.s9L2: Request a copy of the information we hold about you
privacy.s9L3: Opt out of certain communications or data uses
privacy.s9L4: Not be discriminated against for exercising privacy rights
privacy.s9P2: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s9P3: We may need to verify your identity before fulfilling your request.
privacy.s10P1: Our Services are not directed to children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors without appropriate consent.
privacy.s11P1: If you access our Services from outside the United States, be aware that your data may be processed and stored in the U.S., where data protection laws may differ from those in your jurisdiction.
privacy.s12P1: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. When we make material changes, we will post the updated version on this page and update the "Last Updated" date above. Continued use of our Services after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Policy.
privacy.s13P1: For privacy questions, requests, or complaints, please contact:

terms.s1P1Consent: SMS and Mobile Communications Consent Agreement
terms.s1P2: If you do not agree, do not access or use our Services. If you are accessing the Services on behalf of a company or organization, you represent that you are authorized to bind that entity to these Terms.
terms.s2P1: You must be at least 16 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction, if higher) to use our Services. Some job assignments may require a higher minimum age as required by law.
terms.s2P2: By registering, you represent that the information you provide is true, accurate, and complete, and that you will maintain it accordingly.

terms.s5L1: Use the Services only for lawful purposes related to job seeking, employment, scheduling, and communication with us.
terms.s5L2: Do not impersonate another person or entity or misrepresent your affiliation.
terms.s5L3: Do not upload, transmit, or distribute any harmful, fraudulent, or unlawful material.
terms.s5L4: Do not attempt to access data or systems you are not authorized to access.
terms.s5L5: Do not interfere with or disrupt the security, integrity, or performance of the Services.
terms.s5P2: We reserve the right to monitor, moderate, and remove content or access at our sole discretion to maintain platform integrity and compliance.
terms.s6P1: Your use of the platform does not in itself create an employment relationship. If you are hired or assigned to a client, your employment status, pay, and terms are governed by your separate employment documents with C1 Staffing or the relevant employer of record.
terms.s6P2: Nothing in these Terms guarantees a job, assignment, or continued employment.

terms.s7P2: You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the Services for lawful purposes. No rights are transferred to you except as expressly stated.

terms.s8P2: You remain responsible for the accuracy and legality of the content you provide.
terms.s9P1B: explains how we collect, use, and share your information. By using our Services, you consent to our data practices as described therein.
terms.s10P1: The Services may link to third-party websites or integrate with third-party systems (such as payroll, identity verification, or messaging providers). We are not responsible for the content or practices of any third party. Your use of such services is governed by their terms.
